Class EfsEventBus.WildcardAdvertisement<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.WildcardAdvertisement<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event class.
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Enclosing class:
EfsEventBus
public final class EfsEventBus.WildcardAdvertisement<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object
Track concrete advertisements created when new topics for given event class are introduced to event bus. These advertisements are automatically closed when wildcard advertisement is closed.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Field Details

    • mEventClass

      protected final Class<E extends IEfsEvent> mEventClass
      Accessing this event class.

    • mWildcardTopic

      protected final String mWildcardTopic
      Regular expression topic matched against concrete topics.

    • mPattern

      protected final Pattern mPattern
      Compiled mWildcardTopic.

    • mTopicUpdate

      protected final Consumer<EfsTopicKey<E extends IEfsEvent>> mTopicUpdate
      Report newly discovered topic keys to agent via this callback.

    • mAgent

      protected final IEfsAgent mAgent
      Dispatch event to this agent.

  • Method Details

    • addAccess

      protected void addAccess(EfsTopicKey<?> topicKey)
      If this wildcard advertisement is open, then creates a new advertisement for given concrete topic matching wildcard topic. Newly created advertisement's publish status is set to current value.
      Parameters:
      topicKey - concrete topic key matching wildcard.

    • doClose

      protected void doClose()
      Closes all advertisements created when this wildcard advertisement matched a concrete topic.
      See Also:
      • AutoCloseable.close()

    • advertisement

      @Nullable public EfsEventBus.Advertisement<E> advertisement(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey)
      Returns concrete advertisement associated with given topic key. Returns null if there is no such associated advertisement.
      Parameters:
      topicKey - return advertisement associated with this key.
      Returns:
      concrete advertisement with given key or null.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if topicKey is null.

    • advertisementKeys

      public List<EfsTopicKey<E>> advertisementKeys()
      Returns an immutable list containing the concrete topic keys to which this wildcard advertisement is advertised. Note that these topic keys may change over time as event bus encounters new concrete topics which match the wildcard advertisement.
      Returns:
      immutable list of concrete topic keys.

    • advertisementTopics

      public List<String> advertisementTopics()
      Returns an immutable list containing the concrete topics to which this wildcard advertisement is advertised. Note that these topics may change over time as event bus encounters new concrete topics which match the wildcard advertisement.
      Returns:
      immutable list of concrete topics.

    • close

      public void close() throws Exception
      Closes wildcard access point if currently open. If closed, then does nothing.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs.

    • isOpen

      public final boolean isOpen()
      Returns true if wildcard access point is open and false if closed.
      Returns:
      true if wildcard access point is open.

    • eventClass

      public final Class<E> eventClass()
      Returns event class.
      Returns:
      event class.

    • wildcardTopic

      public final String wildcardTopic()
      Returns access point wildcard topic.
      Returns:
      wildcard topic.
